definition: AAMC EO1/2 category: parental education below a bachelor's degree, or any degree with service, clerical, skilled, or unskilled occupation.
AAMC EO3/4/5 category: bachelor's, master's, or doctoral parental education with executive, managerial, or professional occupation.
SES could not be assigned or was unknown, including categories described in the source note.
mutually_exclusive_distribution for the three A-24 SES categories; binary_status_indicator for DACA, first-generation, and fee-assistance indicators.
Published percentage points. For example, 13.8 means 13.8% of the applicable stage total.
Acceptees with the indicator divided by applicants with the same indicator. This is a descriptive aggregate ratio, not an individual school's acceptance rate.
Matriculants with the indicator divided by applicants with the same indicator.
Matriculants with the indicator divided by acceptees with the same indicator.
The entering medical-school academic year reported by AAMC.
